creator: feh@fehcom.de
text:
Hi,

after re-installing /usr/lib/clang/17 from base.xzy (and FreeBSD 13.2), the compiler works like a charm. 

/usr/lib]$ ls -la clang/
total 32
drwxr-xr-x   4 root  wheel    512 May 14 19:26 .
drwxr-xr-x  12 root  wheel  18432 Apr 25 22:42 ..
drwxr-xr-x   5 root  wheel    512 Aug 30  2023 14.0.5
drwxr-xr-x   5 root  wheel    512 Mar  2 03:50 17

Please close the ticket and just use it as reference for similar problems.

--eh.
